examples: For example, Russians use a special kettle called a samovar.
Then old Peter took his big coat off and lifted down the samovar from the shelf.
Or sitting next to the main feast samovar tea, chatting, or rotate around a flood pipe smoking, to celebrate a really good time.
In Russia, tea is prepared in tea rooms using a samovar, an urn of hot water.
The shop provided tea in a samovar, which tasted a little fishy, but I drank one mug after another to soothe my throat and keep my eyes open.
